metadata.description: Name of the environment (e.g., dev, prod)
Primary location for all resources
Resource group name (defaults to rg-copilot-unleashed)
GitHub OAuth app client ID
Session encryption secret
Minimum replicas (0 for dev, 1+ for prod)
Maximum replicas
CPU cores per replica (e.g. 0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4)
Memory per replica (e.g. 0.5Gi, 1Gi, 2Gi, 4Gi, 8Gi)
Comma-separated IP ranges to allow access (CIDR notation, empty = allow all)
Comma-separated GitHub usernames allowed to log in (empty = allow all)
VAPID public key for web push notifications
VAPID private key for web push notifications
Name prefix for the VNet and related resources
Location for the resource
Name of the Container Registry
Location for the resource
Resource ID of the private endpoints subnet. Leave empty to skip private endpoint creation.
Resource ID of the VNet to link the private DNS zone. Leave empty to skip DNS zone creation.
Name of the User-Assigned Managed Identity
Location for the resource
Resource ID of the Container Registry to grant AcrPull
Base name for monitoring resources
Location for the resource
Name prefix for the storage account
Location for the resource
Name of the file share for persistent data
Subnet ID with Microsoft.Storage service endpoint (empty = no VNet rules)
Subnet ID for private endpoint (empty = no private endpoint)
VNet ID for private DNS zone link (empty = no DNS zone link)
Name of the Key Vault
Location for the resource
Principal ID of the managed identity to grant Key Vault Secrets User
Subnet resource ID for the private endpoint (empty = no private endpoint)
VNet resource ID for the private DNS zone link (empty = no DNS link)
Name of the Container App
Location for the resource
GitHub OAuth client ID
Session encryption secret
Comma-separated GitHub usernames allowed to log in (empty = allow all)
Log Analytics workspace ID for the environment
Application Insights connection string
Minimum number of replicas (0 for dev, 1+ for prod)
Maximum number of replicas
Comma-separated allowed origins for CORS (empty = allow app domain only)
Comma-separated IP ranges to allow (CIDR notation, empty = allow all)
CPU cores per container replica (e.g. 0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4)
Memory per container replica (e.g. 0.5Gi, 1Gi, 2Gi, 4Gi, 8Gi)
Subnet ID for Container Apps environment VNet integration (empty = no VNet)
Key Vault URI (e.g., https://myvault.vault.azure.net/)
Key Vault resource name for building secret URIs
Storage account name for volume mounts (empty = no volumes)
Azure Files share name
Storage account key for mounting (empty = no volumes)
VAPID public key for web push notifications
VAPID private key for web push notifications

corsPolicy.allowedOrigins: [if(empty(parameters('allowedOrigins')), createArray(format('https://{0}.{1}', parameters('name'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.App/managedEnvironments', parameters('environmentName')), '2024-03-01').defaultDomain)), union(createArray(format('https://{0}.{1}', parameters('name'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.App/managedEnvironments', parameters('environmentName')), '2024-03-01').defaultDomain)), split(parameters('allowedOrigins'), ',')))]

configuration.secrets: [concat(if(variables('useKeyVault'), createArray(createObject('name', 'github-client-id', 'keyVaultUrl', format('{0}secrets/github-client-id', parameters('keyVaultUri')), 'identity', parameters('managedIdentityId')), createObject('name', 'session-secret', 'keyVaultUrl', format('{0}secrets/session-secret', parameters('keyVaultUri')), 'identity', parameters('managedIdentityId'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'github-client-id', 'value', parameters('githubClientId')), createObject('name', 'session-secret', 'value', parameters('sessionSecret')))), createArray(createObject('name', 'appinsights-connection-string', 'value', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString'))), if(variables('hasAllowedUsers'), createArray(createObject('name', 'allowed-github-users', 'value', parameters('allowedGithubUsers'))), createArray()), if(variables('hasVapidKeys'), createArray(createObject('name', 'vapid-public-key', 'value', parameters('vapidPublicKey')), createObject('name', 'vapid-private-key', 'value', parameters('vapidPrivateKey'))), createArray()))]

containers.name: copilot-unleashed
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'NODE_ENV', 'value', 'production'), createObject('name', 'PORT', 'value', '3000'), createObject('name', 'BASE_URL', 'value', format('https://{0}.{1}', parameters('name'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.App/managedEnvironments', parameters('environmentName')), '2024-03-01').defaultDomain)), createObject('name', 'GITHUB_CLIENT_ID', 'secretRef', 'github-client-id'), createObject('name', 'SESSION_SECRET', 'secretRef', 'session-secret'), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'secretRef', 'appinsights-connection-string'), createObject('name', 'COPILOT_CONFIG_DIR', 'value', '/data/copilot-home'), createObject('name', 'CHAT_STATE_PATH', 'value', '/data/chat-state'), createObject('name', 'PUSH_STORE_PATH', 'value', '/data/push-subscriptions')), if(variables('hasAllowedUsers'), createArray(createObject('name', 'ALLOWED_GITHUB_USERS', 'secretRef', 'allowed-github-users')), createArray()), if(variables('hasVapidKeys'), createArray(createObject('name', 'VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY', 'secretRef', 'vapid-public-key'), createObject('name', 'VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY', 'secretRef', 'vapid-private-key')), createArray()))]

metadata.description: Log Analytics workspace resource ID
Container Registry resource ID (empty = skip)
Storage Account resource ID (empty = skip)
Key Vault resource ID (empty = skip)
